blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 614 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
